/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/16_true_type_fonts.dir/16_true_type_fonts.cpp.o -o /Users/jobkebede/Documents/Maze-Project/output/16_true_type_fonts   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_image/2.8.8/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib
